name: oriental
tagline: Innovative Power Semiconductor Solutions for a Sustainable Future
description: Oriental Semiconductor is a leading Chinese power semiconductor company specializing in IGBT, MOSFET, SiC, and GaN devices. With advanced R&D capabilities and manufacturing expertise, Oriental provides high-performance power solutions for new energy vehicles, industrial drives, renewable energy, and consumer electronics.
longDescription: Oriental Semiconductor (Dongwei) is a premier Chinese fabless semiconductor company founded in 2008, dedicated to developing and manufacturing innovative power semiconductor devices. The company's comprehensive product portfolio includes IGBT modules and discrete devices, high-voltage and low-voltage MOSFETs, silicon carbide (SiC) power devices, and gallium nitride (GaN) transistors. Oriental's products are widely used in new energy vehicles, motor drives, solar inverters, UPS systems, and industrial power supplies. With strong R&D investment and strategic partnerships with leading foundries, Oriental has established itself as a key player in China's power semiconductor industry. The company holds numerous patents in power device design and packaging technology, and its products meet international quality standards including AEC-Q101 for automotive applications. As an authorized Oriental distributor, LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support, application guidance, and reliable supply chain services for customers worldwide.

coreProducts.name: IGBT Modules
coreProducts.description: High-performance IGBT modules for industrial drives, renewable energy, and EV applications with excellent thermal performance and reliability.

coreProducts.name: IGBT Discrete
coreProducts.description: Discrete IGBT devices offering cost-effective solutions for motor drives, power supplies, and inverter applications.

coreProducts.name: MOSFETs
coreProducts.description: High-voltage and low-voltage MOSFETs for switching power supplies, motor control, and power management applications.

coreProducts.name: SiC Power Devices
coreProducts.description: Silicon carbide MOSFETs and diodes delivering superior efficiency and switching performance for high-frequency applications.

industries.name: New Energy Vehicles
industries.description: Power solutions for EV motor drives, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters.

industries.name: Industrial Drives
industries.description: IGBT and MOSFET solutions for variable frequency drives and servo motor control.

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: High-efficiency power devices for solar inverters, wind power systems, and energy storage.

industries.name: Power Supplies
industries.description: MOSFET and IGBT solutions for switching power supplies, UPS, and welding equipment.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and reliability.

certifications.name: AEC-Q101
certifications.description: Automotive-grade qualification for power semiconductor devices used in vehicle applications.

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Automotive quality management system certification for automotive component manufacturing.

seoTitle: Oriental Semiconductor Distributor | IGBT MOSFET SiC Power Devices | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized Oriental Semiconductor distributor. Supplying IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC power devices for EV, industrial, and renewable energy applications. Technical support available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Oriental Semiconductor?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Oriental Semiconductor (Dongwei). We maintain a direct partnership with Oriental, ensuring customers receive genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization covers the complete product line including IGBT modules, MOSFETs, and SiC devices. We provide comprehensive services including technical consultation, sample support, and reliable supply chain management for Oriental products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor authorization and discuss your Oriental product requirements.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Oriental IGBT modules compared to international brands?
faqs.answer: Oriental IGBT modules offer several competitive advantages: First, cost-effectiveness - Oriental provides comparable performance to international brands at more competitive pricing, helping customers reduce BOM costs. Second, localized support - as a Chinese company, Oriental offers faster technical response and application support for the Asian market. Third, customization capability - Oriental can provide customized solutions and packaging options for specific customer requirements. Fourth, supply security - with domestic manufacturing capabilities, Oriental offers more stable supply chain and shorter lead times. Fifth, continuous innovation - Oriental invests heavily in R&D, particularly in emerging technologies like SiC and GaN devices.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate Oriental IGBT modules for cost-sensitive applications or projects requiring local technical support and supply security.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Oriental products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Oriental Semiconductor products including: Product selection guidance based on application requirements and specifications; Reference design evaluation and schematic review; Thermal modeling and power loss calculations; Application troubleshooting and failure analysis; Sample evaluation support; Driver circuit design recommendations; EMC and reliability consulting; On-site technical support for critical projects. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Oriental products across various applications including EV motor drives, solar inverters, and industrial power supplies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for technical consultation on Oriental product selection and application design.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are Oriental products suitable for?
faqs.answer: Oriental Semiconductor products serve a wide range of industries and applications. In new energy vehicles, Oriental IGBTs and SiC devices are used in motor drives, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters. For industrial applications, Oriental provides solutions for variable frequency drives, servo systems, and welding equipment. In renewable energy, Oriental power devices are deployed in solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems. Consumer electronics applications include power supplies, home appliances, and LED drivers. Oriental's automotive-grade products (AEC-Q101 qualified) are specifically designed to meet the stringent reliability requirements of the automotive industry.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your application requirements and consult our FAE team to select the most suitable Oriental products for your specific needs.

faqs.question: How can I request samples and quotations for Oriental products?
faqs.answer: To request samples or quotations for Oriental Semiconductor products, you can contact our sales team through multiple channels: Submit an inquiry through our website contact form; Email our sales department with your requirements; Call our sales hotline for immediate assistance. Please provide the following information for faster processing: Specific Oriental part numbers or product categories; Application description and requirements; Estimated annual quantity; Target price range (if available); Required delivery timeline. For sample requests, we typically provide 2-5 pieces per part number for evaluation purposes. Standard lead time for samples is 1-2 weeks from stock.
faqs.decisionGuide: Prepare your requirements and contact our sales team to request Oriental product samples and quotations.

faqs.question: What is the quality and reliability of Oriental power semiconductor products?
faqs.answer: Oriental Semiconductor maintains high quality and reliability standards across its product portfolio. The company is ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 certified, ensuring robust quality management systems. Automotive-grade products undergo AEC-Q101 qualification testing including high-temperature operating life, temperature cycling, and mechanical stress tests. Oriental products feature advanced packaging technologies for excellent thermal performance and long-term reliability. The company employs comprehensive testing procedures including 100% electrical testing, visual inspection, and reliability screening. Field data shows Oriental products achieve MTBF ratings comparable to international brands, making them suitable for demanding industrial and automotive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Oriental products offer reliable quality for industrial and automotive applications. Contact us for detailed reliability reports and qualification data.

faqs.question: Does Oriental offer automotive-grade power semiconductor products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Oriental Semiconductor offers a comprehensive range of automotive-grade power semiconductor products qualified to AEC-Q101 standards. The automotive product line includes IGBT modules and discrete devices for EV motor drives, high-voltage MOSFETs for onboard chargers and DC-DC converters, and SiC MOSFETs for high-efficiency automotive applications. These products undergo rigorous qualification testing including high-temperature reverse bias, high-temperature gate bias, temperature cycling, and mechanical shock tests. Oriental's automotive products are used by major EV manufacturers and Tier-1 suppliers in China and globally. The company provides PPAP documentation and full traceability for automotive customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, specify Oriental AEC-Q101 qualified products. Contact us for automotive qualification documentation.
